backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a business management platform handling customers, vendors, products, invoices, payments, and Stripe integration, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the GST calculation precision improvement (integer paise arithmetic in gstUtils.ts) to specific frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key features, and recent changes for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'ARAA TRADE LUBES - Business Management Platform' that mounts the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state via Internet Identity, conditionally rendering the login page, profile setup modal, or main dashboard with theme and toast providers.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFinancia: Component displaying a customer's invoices, payments, and outstanding balance with options to generate a print-ready HTML financial summary PDF and a WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/CustomersTab.tsx: React component that provides a full CRUD interface for managing customers, including add/edit/delete dialogs, name-based search, and buttons to view financial summaries and statements for each customer.
frontend/src/components/CustomerStatemen: Component that fetches and displays a chronological ledger statement for a customer, showing sales and payments with running balance formatted in INR.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Dashboard component that displays summary stat cards for customers, vendors, products, invoices, total revenue, and growth, fetching data via query hooks and showing loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/DataExport.tsx: Component that allows users to export customers, vendors, products, invoices, and payments data as CSV files, using utility functions to prepare and download each dataset.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header showing the brand name, a theme toggle button, and an authenticated user dropdown menu with profile edit and logout options.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceDetails.t: Dialog component that displays full invoice details including line items with GST breakdowns (CGST/SGST/IGST), and provides a print function that generates a formatted HTML invoice using the user's business profile.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesTab.tsx: React component that displays a table of invoices with functionality to add, delete, view details, and record payments, using GST calculations and currency formatting utilities.
frontend/src/components/ProductsTab.tsx: React component for managing products with CRUD operations, search, and GST tax rate handling, converting between display percentages and basis points for backend storage.
frontend/src/components/ProfileEditDialo: Dialog component that allows an authenticated user to edit their profile including name, business name, address, GST number, and state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown on first use to collect and save a new user's profile information including business name, address, and GST details; cannot be dismissed without completing setup.
frontend/src/components/TransactionState: Component that renders a transaction statement summary for a customer and provides options to download it as a PDF or share it via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/VendorsTab.tsx: React component for managing vendors with full CRUD operations, search by name, and WhatsApp link generation, using dialogs and tables for the UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend actor, covering user profiles, customers, vendors, products, invoices, and payments.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines vibrant OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting monetary values as INR currency strings, handling bigint-to-number conversion and both paisa-based and rupee-based formatting.
frontend/src/lib/exportUtils.ts: Utility functions for exporting app data (customers, vendors, products, invoices, payments) to CSV files, including helpers for formatting dates and currency amounts for export.
frontend/src/lib/gstUtils.ts: GST calculation utility that mirrors backend Motoko logic using BigInt integer arithmetic in paise to avoid floating-point errors, providing functions for per-line-item GST breakup, invoice summary aggregation, and INR formatting.
frontend/src/lib/pdfUtils.ts: Utility that opens a new browser window with provided HTML content and triggers the native print dialog for PDF generation, without external dependencies.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page with a tabbed layout containing Overview, Customers, Vendors, Products, Invoices, and Export sections.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page for ARAA Trade Lubes that provides an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading state and branded UI.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing ARAA Trade Lubes as an Internet Computer-based invoice/accounting app with pending requests to improve GST calculation precision in both frontend and backend.
